title: Real Estate & Construction Infrastructure
shortDescription: RERA financial compliance, project percentage completion method (POCM) revenue recognition, GST joint development agreement (JDA) tax, and audit.
fullDescription: Real estate development and construction infrastructure projects involve long-term project lifecycles, complex Joint Development Agreements (JDA), RERA regulatory reporting, and intricate GST implications on land, TDR, and construction services. Anil Puneet and Associates provides specialized accounting, audit certification, and tax advisory services for real estate developers, contractors, and infrastructure firms.
keyChallenges: Revenue recognition under Percentage of Completion Method (POCM) and Ind AS 115
RERA quarterly compliance certificates (Form 3) for project escrow bank withdrawals
GST tax implications on Joint Development Agreements (JDA), Development Rights (TDR), and floor space index (FSI)
Capital gains taxation, Section 45(5A) JDA tax timing, and land transaction tax deductions (Section 194-IA)
tailoredSolutions: Independent CA certification (RERA Form 3) verifying project cost incurred and collected funds
Joint Development Agreement GST liability structure planning and input credit optimization
Project-wise cost center accounting, budget variance tracking, and subcontractor audit procedures
Section 194-IA and Section 194M withholding tax compliance monitoring

caseStudy.title: RERA Form 3 Certification & JDA GST Advisory for Residential Project
caseStudy.context: A real estate developer executing a 150-unit residential project required quarterly RERA cost certifications and tax clarity on a newly signed Joint Development Agreement with landowners.
caseStudy.approach: Our firm reviewed project cost records, established separate RERA escrow account audit logs, and structured the GST payment schedule for landowner share allocation.
caseStudy.outcome: Maintained uninterrupted RERA portal compliance and optimized input tax credit utilization against outward construction GST liabilities.
